Off Calendar Aug-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ANDREW C. MCCLELLAND, Esq. of Lunski & Stimpert LLP (Tel: 415-426-3586) for plaintiffs Gaurav Rastogi and Akanksha Sahu;
Atty. KIMBERLY A. MILLINGTON, Esq. of Law Offices of John A. Hauser (Tel: 714-571-0407) for defendants Richard Dale Smith d/b/a Bay Area Tree Specialists and City and County of San Francisco.

Hearing Re: Plaintiffs Gaurav Rastogi And Akanksha Sahu's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Propounded To Defendant Richard Dale Smith, dba Bay Area Tree Service, and For Sanctions.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
